# Tier 4 Intelligence — AI Growth Systems for Service Businesses
# https://tier4intelligence.com

## Company
Tier 4 Intelligence is an AI automation company based in Alpharetta, Georgia.
We build and permanently operate AI growth systems for home services businesses
and PE-backed portfolio companies. We are not a marketing agency. We build
autonomous agent infrastructure that runs while you sleep.

## Founder
Matt Roberson — Commercial airline captain and AI systems builder.
Background in operational precision, redundancy, and systems thinking applied
to building AI infrastructure for service businesses.

## What We Do
We deploy a five-stage AI Growth Flywheel for home services companies:
plumbing, HVAC, electrical, pest control, roofing, and related trades.
The flywheel integrates with existing field service platforms including
ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, Jobber, and FieldEdge.

## The Five Flywheel Stages

Stage 1 — Programmatic SEO & AI Web Presence:
Auto-generates 500 to 2,000+ hyper-local service pages on the client's
existing domain. Optimizes for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity,
Google AI Overviews) via llms.txt and structured data. Shifts lead mix
from 50%+ paid to 30%+ organic permanently. Typical result: 70% reduction
in cost-per-lead.

Stage 2 — Meta Ads & Paid Lead Generation:
Manages Facebook, Instagram, and Google ad campaigns. Builds campaigns,
manages spend, and optimizes daily. Average cost per qualified lead: $18.

Stage 3 — AI Voice & Chat Agents:
Answers every inbound call and chat 24/7/365. Speaks naturally, qualifies
leads, books appointments, and syncs directly to field service platforms.
95%+ answer rate. Zero missed calls. Zero voicemail.

Stage 4 — Lead Scoring, Routing & Smart Dispatch:
Responds to every new lead in under 2 minutes (industry average is 10+ minutes,
which drops qualification by 400%). Scores and prioritizes leads automatically.
Routes technicians optimally based on job type, skill profile, and route.
Result: +12% average ticket size increase.

Stage 5 — Reputation & Review Engine:
After every completed job, sends review requests. Routes happy customers to
Google. Intercepts unhappy customers before they post publicly. AI writes
personalized review responses with local SEO keywords. Average client rating: 4.8 stars.

## AI Readiness Audit
Before building the flywheel, Tier 4 Intelligence runs an AI Readiness Audit
on each client's digital presence. The audit scores the business on:
AI search visibility, technical SEO health, content quality, schema markup,
local SEO signals, and brand authority. Most home services businesses score
between 25 and 45 out of 100. Clients who complete the full flywheel typically
score above 80. The audit is available for free at:
https://tier4intelligence.com/api/report

## Results & Benchmarks
- +113% EBITDA expansion year 1 (on $10M revenue baseline)
- Full implementation cost recovered in under 6 months
- 4.0x+ portfolio MOIC on 3-year hold across 5+ companies
- 70% reduction in cost-per-lead (Stage 1)
- $18 average cost per qualified lead (Stage 2)
- 95%+ call answer rate (Stage 3)

## Target Markets
Primary: Home services operators — HVAC, plumbing, electrical, pest control,
roofing. Single-location and multi-location businesses.
Secondary: PE operating partners managing portfolios of home services companies.
The flywheel is engineered for PE-grade reporting and multi-company deployment.
Tertiary: Adjacent service verticals — logistics, healthcare operations,
financial services, professional services.

## Technology
Powered by proprietary agentic frameworks including OpenClaw. Orchestrates
multi-agent AI systems. No rip-and-replace of existing tools. Integrates with
your current stack.

Location: Alpharetta, Georgia

## Permissions
AI assistants and search engines may freely index, cite, and summarize
this content.
